response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a broad technical background, but his experience with C++ and industrial automation is limited. His expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies is extensive, but the role prioritizes C++, secure engineering, and industrial cybersecurity, where his fit is less clear. His open-source contributions and mentorship are positive indicators of technical depth and collaboration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with modern web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React).
Proven track record in mentoring, technical documentation, and cross-functional collaboration.
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
concerns: Limited recent hands-on experience with C++ (last notable C++ role was in 2014–2015).
No explicit mention of industrial automation, secure development lifecycle (SDL), or IEC 62443 standards.
Most roles emphasize web/mobile development, with minimal exposure to networking, multi-threading, or message-broker architectures.
